title: Graders and Sorters, Agricultural Products
description: Grade, sort, or classify unprocessed food and other agricultural products by size, weight, color, or condition.

tasks.text: Place products in containers according to grade and mark grades on containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh products or estimate their weight, visually or by feel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Discard inferior or defective products or foreign matter, and place acceptable products in containers for further processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Grade and sort products according to factors such as color, species, length, width, appearance, feel, smell, and quality to ensure correct processing and usage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record grade or identification numbers on tags or on shipping, receiving, or sales sheets.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.
